name: Impossible Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a blender, combine 2 cups of milk, 1/2 cup of flour, 1/4 tsp baking powder, 1 pinch of salt, and 3 tbsp unsalted butter.
3. Blend for about one minute until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch pie plate.
5. Sprinkle with coconut flakes or shredded coconut.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes out clean (about 30 minutes).
7. Turn off the heat and let the pie cool before serving.
